entry.title: Re: SAP Datasphere: BW Series – Getting Started (Part 2)
entry.content: @sam82 We are already partially supporting the hierarchy import for SAP BW/4HANA. Please refer to SAP Note 2932647 | Supported and unsupported features with SAP BW/4HANA Model Transfer in SAP Datasphere and SAP Help | Imported SAP BW/4HANA Objects.

entry.title: Re: DTW: "Invalid value [PDN1.baseline][line: 1]...."
entry.content: Unfortunately, the link is dead

entry.title: Variable Pay-Payout curves-Interpolation
entry.content:
Hi Experts

Looking to seek your advice on achieving the following:

  • Bonus Payout percentage against Business achievement % (using Interpolation function)

There are four scenarios that we are looking at where Bonus Payout % will be dependent on Business Achievement % with or without the Performance Min (Threshold) or Performance Max(Stretch).

Attached documents captures these scenarios.

Q1- Would like to understand if these scenarios are supported by SuccessFactors Variable Pay using Interpolation function without using Performance Min and Performance Max and using Performance Target Low and Performance Target High only?

Q2-Should we be looking at Enabling Flexible Payout Curves to achieve these scenarios?  If yes, then how should be using the column “Performance_Step” in the Flexible Payout curves import file to ensure that “Interpolation” function works for us. SAP Help document mentions that this column can be used to set up Payout curves with an unlimited number of “Interpolation” points. It is not clear how entering various points in "Performance_Step" will result in "Interpolation" for any value that falls between two points.

Q3- As the Payout percentage corresponds to Business Achievement %, how do we store Business Achievement %? Should it to stored as a simple number as a point in the Interpolation function or it needs to be stored in a different way.

Many thanks

entry.title: Unlocking Seamless Integration: Principal Propagation in SAP Business One
entry.content:
Integrating extensions with SAP Business One has always been a powerful way to enhance functionality, but there’s a catch—getting authentication and user access to work smoothly across systems often involves complex setups. That’s where Principal Propagation comes in. With the SAP Business One 10.0 FP 2411 release, we introduced Principal Propagation, a game-changing authentication mechanism designed to simplify and secure integrations with partner applications.
This game-changing solution allows partner-developed side-by-side applications to pass the end-user identity directly to SAP Business One’s APIs. This ensures that the APIs not only authenticate the user’s context but also seamlessly propagate their identity into the SAP Business One application itself. This means less time spent on integration and more focus on building what truly matters - innovative solutions for your customers. 

In this blog, we’ll outline the key steps for setting up Principal Propagation between a BTP-based UI application and SAP Business One. Think of this guide as a skeleton framework, highlighting the critical steps to get you started. For a detailed, step-by-step walkthrough, be sure to follow the documentation and videos referenced in each section.

Prerequisites

Before diving into the setup steps, it’s important to ensure you’re equipped with the right resources and foundational knowledge. Since this blog focuses on SAP BTP as the development platform, the following are resources are required:

  • BTP Provider Subaccount with Cloud Foundry Enabled.
    For detailed guidance on setting up your development environment, refer to the Learning Journey: Setting Up the SAP BTP Developer Environment 

  • SAP IAS (Identity Authentication Service)

    Check if an SAP IAS tenant is already assigned to you or request a new one. You can find detailed instructions in the help guide: Get your Tenant 

💡Tip for Beginners: If you’re new to SAP BTP and need an account for tutorials, check out the Learning Journey: Get an SAP BTP Account for Tutorials 

By preparing these resources and brushing up on the tutorials, you’ll be ready to seamlessly implement principal propagation in your integration project. With the prerequisites in place, let’s dive into the steps for setting up Principal Propagation.

Step 1: Set Up the Identity Provider (IDP) in the System Landscape Directory (SLD)

The first step in enabling Principal Propagation is configuring SAP Business One to trust a third-party Identity Provider (IDP). This ensures that both SAP Business One and your partner applications can rely on a shared user identity, streamlining authentication and authorization processes.

What You Need to Do:

  • Access the System Landscape Directory (SLD) with a Landscape User. 
  • Register the third-party IDP to establish a trust relationship with SAP Business One.



  • Add IDP User (User needs to also be added in SAP IAS)



  • Bind IDP user to SAP Business One company User codes.

References:

📖 help.sap - Configuring  Identity and Authentication Management

📹 learning.sap - Configure IAM in SAP Business One 


Step 2: Register Extension's IDP in SAP Business One SSO Extension Manager

To establish a trust relationship between SAP Business One and your partner application, the next step is to register the extension’s Identity Provider (IDP) in the SAP Business One Extension SSO Manager. This ensures that SAP Business One APIs can validate and trust the access tokens issued by your partner extension's IDP. 

What You Need to Do:

  • Access the Extension SSO Manager with a Landscape User.
  • Register the extension IDP's Discovery Endpoint in order to establish a trust relationship with SAP Business One landscape. The Discovery Endpoint provides the configuration details required for your application to communicate securely with the IDP. The Discovery URL for the SAP Authorization and Trust Management service in your SAP BTP Deploy subaccount is structured as follows:
    https://<BTP Deploy subaccount subdomain>.authentication.<region>.hana.ondemand.com/.well-known/openid-configuration



  • Create a bind between the companies to the registered IDP.


💡Tip: Since the extension SSO Manager is configured to trust BTP’s Authorization and Trust Management service (XSUAA), it’s recommended to verify that your BTP subaccount was configured to trust the Identity Authentication Service (IAS). For more details, refer to Step 4 in the following tutorial.

References:

📖 help.sap - Configure Trusted IDP in SAP Business One Extension SSO Manager 

📹 learning.sap - Setting up an SAP BTP Destination for Service Layer 


Step 3: Configure Authorizations for SAP Business One company Users

In every SAP Business One implementation, users are granted specific authorizations for various modules based on their functional roles. To ensure proper authorization checks when accessing SAP Business One data outside the client (e.g., via DI API or Service Layer), it’s essential to configure user permissions correctly. For principal propagation to work seamlessly, follow these steps:

  1. Navigate to the Authorization settings in SAP Business One.
  2. Set the “Disable DI API Permission Check” authorization to “No Authorization” for all users accessing SAP Business One data via DI API or Service Layer (e.g., through your BTP application).

This configuration ensures that authorization checks are enforced for external access, maintaining security and enabling the smooth functioning of principal propagation.

Step 4: Configure a Destination in BTP for Service Layer

As a prerequisite for configuring the destination in BTP, the SAP Business One Service Layer must be available and accessible by SAP BTP. This can be accomplished by either making the Service Layer publicly available through a reverse proxy or by establishing a secure tunnel to the Service Layer within a corporate network using the SAP BTP Cloud Connector. For additional insights, I highly recommend checking out my colleague’s excellent blog Connecting SAP BTP and On-Premise SAP Business One using the SAP Cloud Connector

Once Service Layer is made accessible over the internet using one of the methods described above, it's possible to Configure the SAP BTP Destination.

What You Need to Do:

  • In SAP BTP cockpit, select the subscriber subaccount, and go to Connectivity > Destination. Choose Create Destination.
  • Create a Destination for the Service Layer using NoAuthentication type with two additional properties:
    - URL.headers.X-b1-companyid (value is the company ID which is bound on the Extension SSO Manager)
    - forwardAuthToken (value true; this is for forwarding the token to the SAP Business One API for authentication)

References:

📖 help.sap - Configuring Destination in SAP BTP Cockpit 

📹 learning.sap - Setting up an SAP BTP Destination for Service Layer 

Step 5: Build and Deploy your application to the Deploy Subaccount

What You Need to Do:

  • Create an SAP Fiori Template Project - consume the BTP Destination that was defined in step 4
  • Develop the App (e.g. using SAP Business Application Studio)
  • Test your App with Principal Propagation flow
  • Deploy your App to SAP BTP Cloud Foundry Environment 

References:

📹 learning.sap
- Creating a Basic Template Project 
- Configuring the Deployment Subaccount 
- Deploying an App to the SAP BTP, Cloud Foundry Environment

Summary

Principal Propagation in SAP Business One streamlines authentication and integration for partner-developed applications, ensuring secure and seamless user identity management. I hope you enjoyed reading this blog and find it helpful as you take your first steps in implementing Principal Propagation. Start building today and transform the way your applications integrate with SAP Business One!

entry.title: Error in SOAP Receiver
entry.content:
Hello, I have encountered error response from SOAP receiver below when sending sample XML data via postman. Need your input on this, we have tested several sample data and still occurs. There’s no authentication required - we are using HTTP.

Thank you!

entry.title: Re: Integrating Employee Central With Concur via Integration Center
entry.content: Hello, could you please share it with me? johanna.reitzer@n-ergie.de

entry.title: Second DEV Environment in SAP BTP
entry.content:
Hi all,

I want to create a second CF Space in a subaccount to develop a second version of our Apps, which we are publishing via SAP Build Work Zone to a Launchpad. Background while we are planning this like that, we want a stable version of our apps in production. In Case of an incident we want to be able to develop a fix for this stable version. Furthermore we want to develope a new version with much more features.

We are using SAP BTP ABAP Environment and RAP to develop our "Backend" Fiori Apps.

So my question:

I noticed that SAP Build Workzone in Space independent. Is there any Problem to use Apps with the same ID from different CF Spaces in another SAP Build Workzone Launchpad?

SAP BTP, Cloud Foundry runtime and environment SAP Build Work Zone, standard edition

entry.title: Re: Not able to purchase one attempt for SAP certificatio...
entry.content: Hello vinay, Can you guide after NEFT payment is completed in how many days you have been received the access.

entry.title: Re: Percentage in cross model
entry.content: i created for any but in data action appear this for the parameter:

entry.title: Re: Routing using multiple SSL server certificates over a single IP Address in Web Dispatcher
entry.content: Great article! The step-by-step guidance on configuring multiple SSL server certificates over a single IP address is incredibly helpful. This approach not only simplifies SSL management but also enhances security and flexibility in SAP environments. The inclusion of detailed examples and clear instructions makes it accessible even for those new to this topic. Thanks for sharing such a practical and well-explained solution—this is exactly the kind of resource the SAP community needs! 👏

entry.title: Re: Difference in the value of the condition associated w...
entry.content:
@jignesh_mehta3 here are the screenshots so you can see the amounts:


PRCD_ELEMENTS table with the values associated with the condition types.

The condition type associated with withholding tax is ZJ2W and should calculate the value of condition type ZG03.

Accounting document

The amount to appear on the accounting document should be 97.50 USD and not 9,296.95 USD.

Retention code associated 

Thank you!

entry.title: Re: SAP Developer Challenge - SAP Community Escape House - UI5
entry.content:
That looks great!

A fun way to explore and learn.

entry.title: Re: Datasphere Transport management is terrible, what am...
entry.content: Hello Clemsteich, yes I have been using that function as well too. But if you start working on a new project, it would be great if you could store all changes into a package so that you can transport them all together without having to worry that you forget a change that you made. If you are working on multiple different projects at the same time (which happens because of delays for testing etc) it can be quite difficult keep track of all changes.

entry.title: Change Language in SAP Excel Export - Z_BELEGLISTE
entry.content:
Hello, I have a problem with exporting a table from SAP to Excel.
We have the transaction Z_BELEGLISTE - 360°Material and we enter our parameters there as normal and execute them. The result is an SAP list with German headings in the columns. As soon as I export this list to Excel, the headings are in English. It doesn't matter whether I export by right-clicking in the table or using the “Export” button.
It only works if I use the “List output” button and then export the generated table to Excel.
Is it possible to set somewhere that the headings are created in German when I want to export? The problem occurs with several users and only with this table.

I hope you know what to do.

Greetings

Translated with DeepL.com (free version)

entry.title: Re: Not able to purchase one attempt for SAP certificatio...
entry.content: @Akshay171997 hi, it takes around 3-5 days to get access. It's better you provide payment proof and ur details in the same case.

entry.title: Re: User-exit to redetermine Collection Group in SD-Billing
entry.content: Where it is maintained on SD side and anywhere stored currently in Sales Order or billing ?

entry.title: Re: Change Language in SAP Excel Export - Z_BELEGLISTE
entry.content: Probably "overfluid" question but is the client language of the PC, on which you export the excel file, setup for german language? And second question: Does this happen only on one PC or is the issue reproducable on other PCs too? And finally third question: Is this an issue of a certain environment like only happens on ED0 or also on EP? Basically trying to find out if it is only happening on Dev PCs or on Customer PCs too.

entry.title: Re: Mass Update Task Capability in SAP Cloud ALM
entry.content:
Hi @Iva_Ram 

You can get information about authorization mapping and the basics of user provisioning in the following blog:

https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-sap/centralize-authorization-management-of-sap-cloud-alm-using-the-identity/ba-p/13609455

Best regards

Megha

entry.title: Re: collect result of STARTING NEW TASK running multiple...
entry.content:
Hi all,

I tried to resolve this problem by implementing a cl_abap_parallel class instance. This way i have started a new task parallel to the the save RAP method implementation of the behavior pool class. And once the task finishes it returns a result table and the Fiori screen can be refreshed with the completed final results. 

This sounds to me quite a workaround solution though, it was simply applicable and clean. I would like to still hear new suggestions.

entry.title: how to use "one time contract accounts"
entry.content:
Hello,

We are looking for background information regarding the "one time contract account" functionality. When should we use it? What is the main purpose of this functionality?

Does it really make sense to use the one time contract account functionality, or should we just create "normal" contract accounts for our business partners?

We are using IS-U, but we are also using SD for other sales. Our aim is to integrate the SD sales into the FI-CA subledger (in stead of FI-AR).

Best Regards,
Henk Hoogerbrug

entry.title: Re: CIS (Cloud Identity Services) - IAS & IPS
entry.content: Thank you very much for the feedback. I am now also wondering if IAG (Identity Access Governance) is also included in CIS, along with IAG and IPS? Or is this a product that needs to be purchased and licenses separately?

entry.title: Re: SAP BTP ABAP Environment – Manage System Hibernation
entry.content:
Hi Frank,
great description of the hibernation feature, many thanks. Are they any plans to include a notification to chosen users, whenever the system is started? I believe this would be a good feature for distributed developer teams (different countries, different languages).

Best Regards
Gabriel

entry.title: Re: SAP Certification Transformation: How You Can Get and Stay Certified
entry.content:
Hi @kamala13 

To ensure that you keep certified after 31.03.2025 you can please setup your SAP Universal ID ( Watch this video for setup guidance) and sign in to your My Learning page and go to "Certifications" to see your current certifications and expiration dates.   If your certification does not appear there then it might require you to take an alternative certification.

Please in this case check find and complete an alternative certification exam by March 31, 2025, to maintain your certified status.

If you´re certification is listed in My Learning you can extend the validity via pressing "Manage certification" and take the assessement.

 

to your second question: the courses to prepare for the assessment to stay certified are not mandatory. They are additional content we provide for the learner to help to pass the assessment. The only thing that is mandatory is to pass the assessment but not do complete the content.

When all content that is part of a course it should be shown in the learning history as completed. If this is not the case there might be content that has not yet been reviewed completed. If all content was reviewed and it is still not showing up as completed in the History I would ask to open a support ticket as this might be a technical issue that I cannot solve but our support colleagues can.
Kind Regards, Suzanne

entry.title: Re: CIS (Cloud Identity Services) - IAS & IPS
entry.content: IAG is part of the umbrealla of SAP Cloud Identity Services but its not bundled with IAS and IPS. IAG will be separate license to be purchased. Usually IAG ( Identity Access Governance) will be taken care by customers separately but if there is no solution exist at customer, then customer will go for purchasing the IAG to control the access and compliance for users and applications with roles.

entry.title: Re: How to set default values in Input elements on the Cr...
entry.content:
@Putra 

You can use Default Values Function to set default values for fields on the Object Page. Please note, however, that this functionality is relatively new, and may not be available if you are using S/4HANA on-premise.

https://help.sap.com/doc/abapdocu_cp_index_htm/CLOUD/en-US/abenrap_feature_table.html

An alternative, in case the above method is not available is to use Default Factory Action.

entry.title: Re: Not able to purchase one attempt for SAP certificatio...
entry.content: Hello Nasir, Thanks for your reply. I have attached the payment proof and details in the same case. One more thing need to confirm that you have also done the payment for Account number SAPIXXXXXXXXXX and X will be the mobile number right?. Beneficiary account will be SAP.

entry.title: Re: Check compatibility pack usage in SAP S/4HANA with SAP EarlyWatch Alert
entry.content:
Hi @SusanneGlaenzer 
by random I detected the new functionality in the EWA Word chapter "Upgrade Planning" with subchapters (before I saw this nice blog article)

  • Applications being Replaced
  • Compatibility Package Usage - Expiry 31.12.2025
  • Silent Data Migration

and there are also part of https://me.sap.com/ewa/solutionfinder/generic/filters/search=compat 

But chapter "Upgrade Planning" seems to be missing in the generated PDF EWAs. Do you know why?
Is it planned to be added in the EWA PDF Reports, in the future, too?

In general, the PDF EWA reports seems to have some chapters less than the EWA Word reports.
Example of an S/4 HANA on premise system:

Word

PDF

1 Service Summary

1 Service Summary

2 Landscape

2 Landscape

3 Service Data Quality and Service Readiness

3 Service Data Quality and Service Readiness

4 Software Configuration for <SID1>

4 Software Configuration for <SID1>

5 Hardware Capacity

5 Hardware Capacity

6 Business Key Figures

-

7 Workload of System <SID1>

6 Workload Overview <SID1>

8 Performance Overview <SID1>

7 Performance Overview <SID1>

9 RFC Load by Initiating Action

6.4 RFC Load by Initiating Action

10 SAP System Operating <SID1>

8 SAP System Operating <SID1>

11 Security

9 Security

12 Software Change and Transport Management of <SID1>

10 Software Change and Transport Management of <SID1>

13 Financial Data Quality

11 Financial Data Quality

14 Data Volume Management (DVM)

12 Data Volume Management (DVM)

15 Inconsistencies in Materials Management - Inventory Management

-

18 Upgrade Planning

-

19 SAP HANA Database <SID1>

13 SAP HANA Database <SID1>

20 SAP HANA Database <SID2>

14 SAP HANA Database <SID2>

21 SAP HANA SQL Statements in <SID1>

15 SAP HANA SQL Statements in <SID1>

22 SAP HANA SQL Statements in <SID2>

16 SAP HANA SQL Statements in <SID2>

23 SAP NetWeaver Gateway

17 SAP NetWeaver Gateway

24 UI Technologies Checks

18 UI Technologies Checks

25 Trend Analysis

19 Trend Analysis

entry.title: Automatic postings don't keep the custom dimension filled
entry.content:
Hi everyone,

In the Fiori app "Customs Fields & Logic," a new custom dimension has been defined enabling a new field in the ACDOCU table.

When posting a journal with The custom dimension filled and that it is going to trigger the deferred tax Fs Items, defined in  "Specify Selected FS Items for Automatic Posting"(t-code SAPL1FC),the automatically generated lines of the journal keep the custom field dimension blank. As I'm looking forward to have the automatically generated lines filled with the same custom field dimension value of the relevant source lines, is there a standard way to overcome this? What's the suggested workaround?

Thanks in advance for any insight.

entry.title: Re: Optimizing the Code GROUP BY in loop
entry.content: Can you give a rough estimate on how many entries are in the local table? You are using field symbol so the execution should be pretty fast, especially on larger amounts of data. My first guess was that the call of the mdg_ecc_bp_vkorg_vtweg_key function might be the cause of the slow down because aggregating *should* be done in DB memory making it super fast. And usually bottlenecks are in place you expect them the last 😉

entry.title: Re: Vendor Partial payments in line with automatic clearing
entry.content:
This can be achieved by way of a simple LSMW for the tcode f-44

select only required documents or say only a particular spl gl indicator. deselect normal items. once inside, activate all the line items, go to charge off difference enter posting key and spl gl and place * in amount simulate post.

so lsmw tempalte will have only vendor code, spl gl and * for amount.

entry.title: Re: Mapping of Multiple Cost Elements for Actuals for CPM Resources
entry.content: It would be nice to revive this question and get an answer to it. I find CPM an extensive Module that is not well documented and not easily accessible.

entry.title: Re: Datasphere Transport management is terrible, what am...
entry.content: Good Point Alexander. We are also struggling with same issue. for new objects no issues to collect, but existing object is the issue and we are also looking for the table. which will list of objects with package list in the table will def help

entry.title: Re: SAP Companion - Duplicate help topics
entry.content:
Thanks for the reply Shane.

I searched for a duplicate of shell-home too and there wasn't anything there.

I wonder if I upset companion by trying to add more entries to the Screen IDs section of the !whatsnew object? 

The reason I was trying to do this is because I wanted to experiment with adding a user feedback link tile to multiple screens, but realise this probably isn't the right way of doing something like that.

I've deleted the !whatsnew object now and am able to access companion again.

Many thanks,

Andrew

entry.title: Re: Check compatibility pack usage in SAP S/4HANA with SAP EarlyWatch Alert
entry.content:
Hi @SusanneGlaenzer 
I see the information (chapter "Upgrade Planning" in Landscape Check and also in the EWA Word Reports, but not in the EWA PDF Reports

  • Applications being Replaced
  • Compatibility Package Usage - Expiry 31.12.2025
  • Silent Data Migration

Do you know why and if it is planned to add the information in the PDF reports, too?
I see some differences between Word and PDF EWA reports:
Example of an S/4 HANA on-premise system:

Word

PDF

1 Service Summary

1 Service Summary

2 Landscape

2 Landscape

3 Service Data Quality and Service Readiness

3 Service Data Quality and Service Readiness

4 Software Configuration for <SID1>

5 Hardware Capacity

5 Hardware Capacity

6 Business Key Figures

-

7 Workload of System <SID1>

6 Workload Overview <SID1>

8 Performance Overview <SID1>

7 Performance Overview <SID1>

9 RFC Load by Initiating Action

6.4 RFC Load by Initiating Action

10 SAP System Operating <SID1>

8 SAP System Operating <SID1>

11 Security

9 Security

12 Software Change and Transport Management of <SID1>

10 Software Change and Transport Management of <SID1>

13 Financial Data Quality

11 Financial Data Quality

14 Data Volume Management (DVM)

12 Data Volume Management (DVM)

15 Inconsistencies in Materials Management - Inventory Management

-

18 Upgrade Planning

-

19 SAP HANA Database <SID1>

13 SAP HANA Database <SID1>

20 SAP HANA Database <SID2>

14 SAP HANA Database <SID2>

21 SAP HANA SQL Statements in <SID1>

23 SAP NetWeaver Gateway

17 SAP NetWeaver Gateway

24 UI Technologies Checks

18 UI Technologies Checks

25 Trend Analysis

entry.title: Fiori Launchpad designer does not work with 403 forbidden error
entry.content:
Attempt to access Fiori Launchpad Designer for viewing Config file which has been deployed in SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition System?


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Fiori Launchpad designer does not work with 403 forbi...
entry.content:
Fiori Launchpad Designer is not intended to be used in S/4HANA Public Cloud Edition. 

The activation/deactivation of IAM apps of type "app authorization variants" in a business role will be possible based on assigned business catalogs with SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition 2502.

For more information, please refer to:

Display IAM Apps | SAP Help Portal

Maintain Business Roles | SAP Help Portal

IAM Information System | SAP Help Portal

entry.title: Re: SAP Certification Transformation: How You Can Get and Stay Certified
entry.content: It is shown as completed, in the activity section and expire date is April, but in SAP for me, the expiration date will not change, keeped as before (31.03.2025)

entry.title: Re: HCM FabFiori - Integration of Leave Request Approval...
entry.content: Not sure if anyone still needs an anwer regarding this, but you might want to check note 2791031 - Approve Leave Request Version 3 regarding the configuration of the Approve Leave Request v3 app.

entry.title: Re: to block the stock for customers
entry.content:
Very wrong answers in my opinion on this one.
Sending it to W stock will make it customer property and not just reserved for customer.

Better post it to E stock to a dummy sales order number (if no SO exists).

entry.title: Re: Error while uploading data through DTW for Good Recei...
entry.content:
Hi,

The general date format for all dates in DTW is YYYYMMDD. Try formatting the dates in your Excel file to this format and run the simulation again.

If Excel automatically changes the format of the date, set the cell format to General and re-enter the date in the required format

entry.title: Re: Change Language in SAP Excel Export - Z_BELEGLISTE
entry.content: Found this SAP Note https://me.sap.com/notes/0003487871 about wrong column header in Excel export

entry.title: Re: RAP OData v4 Web-API metadata set nullable option
entry.content: I stumbled across the problem, that the metadata document is correct, but casting X (true) to the NullValueIndicator infuences the response as the property is set to null. Casting a blank (false) yields the correct entry in the metadata document (nullable="false" is gone) and the correct value for the property.

entry.title: Join Us Live: SAP Customer Data Cloud & Commerce Cloud Integration Essentials
entry.content:
What is it about?

In this live session, you will explore the integration between SAP Customer Data Cloud and SAP Commerce Cloud.

Learning objectives

By the end of this live session, you will be able to:

  • Configure the integration between SAP Customer Data Cloud, SAP Commerce Cloud, and Composable Storefront
  • Navigate through the integration codes and setup configurations
  • Validate the integration flows and features within SAP Customer Data Cloud, SAP Commerce Cloud, and Composable Storefront

    Target Audience 

    • Technical Consultants
    • Functional Consultants

How can you book it?

Free for internals, or partners/customers with a valid learning hub subscription, please  click here to register for this session.

You can check the following videos of: Integrating SAP Commerce Cloud and Composable Storefront with SAP Customer Data Cloud - Part 1, Part 2, Part 3

for a sneak peek of the B2C live demos, B2B integration will also be introduced if time allows.

entry.title: Re: Difference in the value of the condition associated w...
entry.content:
@Lakshmipathi 

Configuration in V/08 

Configuration in VK11

Thank you

entry.title: Issue with i18n Configuration in SAP CAP: Only Translates to the Base Language
entry.content:
Hi everyone,

I’m developing a backend with SAP CAP, and I’m facing an issue with the configuration of i18n files. My application is only using translations from the base i18n.properties file (English), but it’s not loading translations from the i18n_es.properties file for Spanish.

Here are the details of what I’ve checked so far:

  1. i18n Files:

    • I have the base i18n.properties file with English texts.
    • I’ve also created the i18n_es.properties file with translations into Spanish.
    • Both files are located in a folder named _i18n, which I’ve placed in the root directory of the project.

  2. Accept-Language Header:

    • In the HTTP requests, I’m sending the Accept-Language header as es,en-US;q=0.9,en;q=0.8.
    • I’ve verified that the value of req._locale is 'es,en-US;q=0.9,en;q=0.8', which indicates that es should be the preferred language.

  3. package.json Configuration:

    • I’ve tried adding the following configuration to set the default language:
      "cds": { "i18n": { "default_language": "es" } }

Despite all this, the application still only uses the translations from the i18n.properties file and doesn’t pick up the Spanish translations.

Questions:

  1. Is there any additional configuration needed in SAP CAP to recognize and use language-specific files like i18n_es.properties?
  2. Could there be an issue with how CAP determines the language based on req._locale?

I would greatly appreciate any advice or solutions to make my backend recognize and use Spanish translations.

Thanks in advance!

entry.title: Re: Transfer Posting Mov Type 311 restrict "R10 Other"

entry.title: Re: Difference in the value of the condition associated w...
entry.content:
@joanaferreira1 

In the screenshots about, the Condition ZJ2W is a Statistical Condition without any Account Keys assigned to it. So I am not sure how can this be post in Accounting document. 

The source of USD 9296.95 seems to be the Condition associated with Tax Code F2. 

I believe for Condition ZJ2W, tax Code IR is assigned. 

Thanks,

entry.title: Re: Automatic postings don't keep the custom dimension fi...
entry.content: Did you already read this blog: Extensibility for Group Reporting

entry.title: Re: Understand DMS API – Free Postman Collection!!
entry.content:
Also note that some APIs require the objectId and some require the path.

Path

When creating a document, you provide the path (in the URL path) to the folder where you want the document created, as in the Create Document API.

ObjectId

When listing the child objects of a specific object, you supply the object ID, like Get Children API, or when deleting an object with the Delete Object API.

entry.title: Re: Difference in the value of the condition associated w...
entry.content:
@jignesh_mehta3  Thank youu for your answer!

I can't understand why on the SD side I'm getting the calculations right, but when I transfer to accounting I'm not.

I could try putting an account key associated with condition type ZJ2W.

Configuration in VK11

Thank you

entry.title: Re: Datasphere Transport management is terrible, what am...
entry.content: At least it's good to know that I am not alone in my troubles. Sometimes I'm thinking that working without a test system might be better because the transport management is so time consuming!

entry.title: Confirming BOM Planned Order using confirmed Purchase Orders for component
entry.content:
Hi Gurus,

I am trying to find how we can use component's confirmed PO as a source of confirmation for BOM's Planned Order.

We are using both ECC and GATP in our system. We create Planned Orders in ECC. Currently our system is only confirming planned order if we have stock for all the components. Requirement is if we have stock for components or an A1 confirmed Purchase Order, that should result in a confirmed (firmed) Planned Order.

Planned Order should use dates from A1 confirmed Purchase Orders as gating component's available date.

I have already added AH ATP category (for A1 confirmed PO) to all the possible check controls (02-A, 02-PL, ZN-A, ZN-PL) but still I am unable to get desired results.

We are using ZN as a custom avail check for BOM material. We use MATP and we do not have RBA enabled.

 

This is an urgent requirement, and I have scanned multiple sources but no luck. Any assistance or guidance would be appreciated. 

 

Thank You.

 

Regards,

MY

entry.title: Re: Not able to purchase one attempt for SAP certificatio...
entry.content: @Akshay171997 yeah I have done payment and received access too.yes, same as you said.

entry.title: Passing variables between test processes
entry.content:
Hi,
I am automating regressing tests using the Test Automation Tool.

I need to pass values from one test process to another. Within a Test Process (from Test Process Step A to Test Process Step B for example) this is easy and works just fine. But I need to pass it from Test Process 1 to Test Process 2, so a level up.

Example:   In Test Proces 1 I create an order and have an order number. I want to use the order number in Test Proces 2 and maybe in Test Proces 3 and Test Proces 4 as well.  I can't use "fixed values" as the order number is generated in Test Proces 1 and will be a different one in the next test run. 

I was thinking this might be possible using Test Data Containers, but I can't figure out if this is possible. So I ask my question here: Is there a way to pass variables from Test Process to Test Process or works this only within a Test Process from Test Process step to Test Process Step as the syntax "#<Process Step ID>-<Parameter Name>" seems to suggest.

entry.title: Re: Automatic postings don't keep the custom dimension fi...
entry.content: Yes.I already checked that.Thanks.It seems to be a limit but I'd like to know if there's any feasible workaround.

entry.title: User Creation in SAP Analytics Cloud
entry.content:
Hi everyone,

I’ve come across a strange behavior in our SAP Analytics Cloud (SAC) and was wondering if anyone else has experienced something similar or might have a solution.

The Issue: I recently created a new user, and I noticed that this user does not have the hourglass icon (symbol for “status in progress”) displayed, whereas other newly created users in the same system do show the hourglass icon.

Could this be due to a synchronization delay or possibly a bug?

entry.title: Re: How to setup Business Application Studio for python development
entry.content: Como fazer uma instalação de Django Python Sqlite?

entry.title: Obsolete BW 0FISPCER time data - How to kill that right ?
entry.content:
Hi,

this is a quest for BW Modelling gurus - Got Obsolete BW 0FISPCER3 data - How to kill that right ?

Got in the Query Lookup senseless 0FSICPERs like 366, 365,… - why so ever -, and want to get rid of them. Can I hard delete the data in the SID table ?

Query Paramater 0FISCPER:

This data originates from the  0FISCPER3 SID Table /BI0/SFISCPER3:

The 0FSICPER3 masterdata table /BI0/PFISCPER3 is fine:



This might be due to 0FSICPER3 is using local implementation class CL_RSMD_RS_0FISCPER3:

I am using embedded BW:
SAP_BW              758         0001      SAPK-75801INSAPBW   SAP Business Warehouse

---> Can I hard delete the obsolete data or is there a deletion procedure (RSDMDD_DELETE_BATCH won’t work because it’s the SID table) or what do I kill ?

DELETE FROM /BI0/SFISCPER3 where CHCKFL <> ‘X’

Some advice would be nice  because this is related to all 0FISCs.

Thank You !

Best Martin

entry.title: SAP Stammtisch na dobry początek roku 2025 - Spotkanie pomysłów i innowacji - Relacja Styczniowa
entry.content:
Witajcie!

Za nami pierwsze w tym roku spotkanie społeczności SAP Stammtisch, które odbyło się w wyjątkowej, noworocznej atmosferze dlatego na wstępie chcemy wszystkim złożyć życzenia: 

 

  • Szczęśliwego Nowego Roku!
  • Happy New Year!
  • Frohes Neues Jahr!
  • Bonne Année!
  • ¡Feliz Año Nuevo!
  • Buon Anno!
  • Feliz Ano Novo!
  • Šťastný Nový Rok!
  • Šťastný Nový Rok!
  • Gelukkig Nieuwjaar!
  • Gott Nytt År!
  • Godt Nytt År!
  • Щасливого Нового року! (Shchaslyvoho Novoho roku!)
  • Boldog Új Évet!
  • З Новым годам! (Z Novym hodam!)
  • ano to jeszcze po Kaszubsku "Szëśćlëwëgo Nowégò Rokù" i po Śląsku "Szczęśliwego Nowego Roku we familiji!" ;-). 

     

Z radością możemy podsumować nasze pierwsze spotkanie w tym roku – SAP Stammtisch, które odbyło się w niezwykłej, noworocznej atmosferze w Pubie CyberTap w Katowicach. To była doskonała okazja, by podzielić się wnioskami z minionych miesięcy, opowiedzieć o planach na nadchodzący rok oraz jakie wyzwania przed każdym stoją. Frekfencja jak na styczeń dopisała znakomicie. Niezabrakło jak zawsze wymiany opinii i doświadczeń na różne tematy związane z technologią i pracą. Widzimy wszyscy, że technologia SAP daje nam ponad przeciętne możliwości rozwoju i jest odporna na chwilowe rynkowe zawirowania.  

W doskonałym towarzystwie mieliśmy okazję porozmawiać o różnorodnych tematach związanych z SAP, była możliwość poznać nowych członków i odświeżyć stare znajomości Katowickiej Grupy SAP. Do tego wszystkiego, delektowaliśmy się prawdopodobnie najlepszym piwem w mieście .

Jak już zazaczyliśmy wcześniej obecność na spotkaniu była wspaniała, więc kontynuujmy tę dobrą energię i spotkajmy się również w nadchodzących miesiącach!

Zarezerwuj już teraz następny termin w swoim kalendarzu:

  • 26 luty 2025

    Pozdrawiamy serdecznie, do zobaczenia 👋😊 , 🍻

entry.title: Re: SuccessFactors Joule - Joule and EC Quick Actions
entry.content:
thanks for your blog @jenny_geipel. When clicking the link to List of transaction use cases I am getting an error that page could not be found. Can you take a look at it?

kr,
Linda

entry.title: Re: Check compatibility pack usage in SAP S/4HANA with SAP EarlyWatch Alert
entry.content:
Hi @uta_hedemann ,

the EWA report as pdf version is generated in a Solution Manager on-prem system and not centrally at SAP, like the Word report you refer to. The go-to version is the one from SAP for Me, which can be consumed as Word report or directly in the apps EWA Reports and Solution Finder. 

The content differs, since SAP has developed EWA checks in the last couple of years, which can only be run at SAP since they either need SAP HANA as a foundation (e.g. forecasts) or a specific data source which is only available at SAP.

It is highly recommended to consume the EWA results in SAP for Me, instead of the reports generated by Solution Manager. This way you are sure that the latest check logic is executed and you don't miss out on critical findings.

Thanks for the overview on which chapters are included in your example reports!

Best regards, Susanne

entry.title: Calculations within test
entry.content:
Hi all,

I'm setting up automated regression test using the TAT for SAP S/4HANA cloud and I want to set up some checks based on calculations, is this possible in the tool. I haven't been able to find the possibilities so far.

What I would like to do is, for example, create an order with 1500 items AAA for a price X and 2300 items BBB for price Y. The total amount Z (which would be 1500*X + 2300*Y) I want to check against the value in the system.
I want Z to be calculated within the test as the prices (X and Y) will change in the test

entry.title: BAPI for MB52 and MMSC
entry.content:
Hi !!!

I needBAPI to fetch stock report  storage location wise data for MB52 t-code. Right now i am using ''BAPI_MATERIAL_STOCK_REQ_LIST'' single material wise where not given storage location wise.

In MB52 we can get data as per our desired search data. Can you please suggest me any BAPI to get stock data as per storage location.

Using  MMSC t-code we can add material & plant based storage location. I need BAPI which is used to add new storage location based on data. Its a retail based business so need to use third party app to change data through API.

Please guided me - Rajib

Rajib

entry.title: Your Insights on SAP SuccessFactors Enhancements
entry.content:
Hello,

I hope you’re doing well. I am reaching out as part of a new initiative where we develop applications using the SAP BTP platform for the customers who are already using SAP SuccessFactors. Our goal is to create solutions that address common challenges in day-to-day operations and keep businesses fully integrated within the SAP ecosystem.

Currently, we’re working on three proof-of-concept applications designed to enhance operational efficiency and effectiveness. To make sure we’re solving the right problems, we’ve created a short survey to gather insights from professionals like you.

https://forms.gle/HX4Sh1JSphN84vmL8

Your feedback will help shape these solutions and guide the development of future applications tailored to real-world needs. The survey only takes a few minutes, and your input would be invaluable to us.

If you have any questions or additional thoughts, we’d be happy to connect further. Thank you in advance for sharing your expertise!

We look forward to staying connected.

Best regards

entry.title: Re: Consuming Data Exposed by SAP Datasphere via the OData API
entry.content:
thank you @Jorge_Martinez. I was able to use this uri: https://oauth.powerbi.com/views/oauthredirect.html

Following this  PRESSEMITTEILUNG paper.

 

The only drawback is we have to renew the refresh token after every 180 days.

entry.title: SAP Customer Data Platform Certification Update and Stay Certified 2411 Release
entry.content:
On behalf of the SAP CRM & CX Product Learning CoE team, I am thrilled to announce the official release of the updated SAP Customer Data Platform Certification and the new SAP Customer Data Platform Stay Certified release.

SAP Certified Associate - Implementation Consultant - SAP Customer Data Platform

This certification verifies that you possess SAP Customer Data Platform the cores and core skills in the SAP Customer Data Solutions line of business area required of the consultant profile and proves that you have an overall understanding and in-depth technical skills to participate as a member of an SAP Customer Data Platform implementation project team. The certification is recommended as an entry-level qualification.

It is important to note that proper preparation for the exam is highly recommended. To ensure success, consider attending the following:

  • C4H63 SAP Customer Data Platform Implementation Training: This course contains ALL the essential content required for passing the exam. Enrolling in this course is highly beneficial.
  • Check out our Hands-on Practice System Hands-on Practice for SAP Customer Data Platform Implementation Training  the practical experience designed to enhance your understanding, with PDFs of the training materials accessible in the exercise environments. 
  • Browse SAP Learning site to find available SAP Customer Data Platform Learning Journeys, Videos and Live Sessions.

 

Stay Certified

A Stay Certified program ensures you aren't left behind as SAP Customer Data Platform technology advances. It provides you the opportunity to familiarize yourself with the latest updates and product changes and keep your certification valid. The Stay Certified program contains:

  • Stay Certified SAP Customer Data Platform: An online course where you can learn about the major enhancements for certification SAP Customer Data Platform to prepare for the assessment to stay certified.
  • An assessment which checks your knowledge on the latest features. When you feel comfortable with the material, you can take the assessment. If you pass it successfully, your certification will be valid for one year.

Note: The Stay Certified offer is for subscribed learners on learning.sap.com platform.

entry.title: Re: Triggering Application Logs Using Object Oriented Approach Through Reports
entry.content:
If you are on a somewhat recent ABAP-Stack, you could use the "CL_BAL_LOGGER" instead of re-inventing the (OO-)wheel ... There is not much documented on this object, unfortunately.
In ABAP-Cloud / BTP the class "CL_BALI_LOG" is provided, incl. documentation on SAP-Help.
Finally, check out some of the Opensource-efforts to create simplified / shortened OO-code for the Appl.Logger on "https://dotabap.org/".

Hope this helps

Nic T.

entry.title: Re: C_SECAUTH_20 SAP System Security and Authorizations -...
entry.content:
Hello,

For others looking for the answer to this question. SAP has released a new Certification - "C_SEC_2405" which very similar to the expired certification, & probably a successor. You can find more details here - https://learning.sap.com/certifications/sap-certified-associate-security-administrator

entry.title: Re: New webcast series on “SAP BTP DevOps and Observability in Action”
entry.content:
Watch recordings here (links also added to the blog post itself):

  • Unlock the potential of DevOps on SAP BTP with SAP Cloud ALM
  • SAP Cloud ALM for SAP BTP Operations
  • Logging + alerting with SAP Cloud ALM for your SAP BTP apps: deep-dive lecture and demo
  • Reduce your ops efforts with SAP Cloud ALM, SAP Automation Pilot + Terraform Provider for SAP BTP: deep-dive lecture and demo
  • Deliver your content on SAP BTP (covering CI/CD + transports): deep-dive lecture

entry.title: Re: Parallel operations in IBP S&OP TS Based Heuristics
entry.content:
For the sequence Operation 1 -> Operation 3 -> Operation 2 -> Operation 4 you would set:
For resource 1 / operation 1: PCAPACONSSTART = PCAPACONSEND = 0
For resource 2 / operation 3: PCAPACONSSTART = PCAPACONSEND = 1
For resource 3 / operation 2: PCAPACONSSTART = PCAPACONSEND = 2
For resource 4 / operation 4: PCAPACONSSTART = PCAPACONSEND = 3

The operations are only implictly defined via the PCAPACONSSTART/END offsets. If you need additonally other operation sequences you'd have to define additional production sources. Are there any other restrictions/requirements on the operations? If yes, it'll be probably hard/impossible to model this is TSBP.

entry.title: SAP generates multiple interplant purchase requisitions for the same demand.
entry.content:
Hi,

I was hoping that someone might have an idea where the issue may be coming from and how it can be fixed.

When new sales order for Plant A is created, multiple replenishment request are generated for Plant B. 

For example we have a sales order for 100ea of X, but instead of generating one replenishment order for 100ea to Plant B, system generates over time dozens of them, each for 100ea and the same delivery date. 

Any ideas?

entry.title: Re: Custom CDS Views - Using Multiple Data Sources
entry.content:
Hello @Gerd_x Gerd,

The Custom CDS View (Cube) is not allowing you to define search criteria. I suspect that this might be the root cause of the errors you are getting. If this is the case, you can't do anything about it if you stick with the Custom CDS View defined by the Key User tool as it does not allow setting the @Search annotations. You may want to try defining the Cube as a Developer using ADT, C1 release it and then use it in your query.

Are there warnings in your cube view already? Or just in the query?

Best Regards
Andreas

entry.title: Block HU inside HU
entry.content:
Hello!

How to block the possibility of a HU within another Hu, that is: Block Hu within a HU.

Tanks!

entry.title: Re: SuccessFactors Joule - Joule and EC Quick Actions
entry.content:
seams we have a new URL for the use cases. Have a look here: Use Cases Supported in Joule | SAP Help Portal

Blog Post is updated 🙂

entry.title: Re: Why does Hybris startup hang when near SessionFixatio...
entry.content:
I have debugged this issue because we suffer from the exact same problem.

The current workaround is to configure tomcat.startStopThreads to stay below 15 threads.

The reason why limiting threads works is because the Tomcat runs into a concurrency issue when starting the server with too many threads.
The problem appears because of loading multiple *webservices extensions that have a WebConfig class which extends DelegatingWebMvcConfiguration. Looking at thread dumps: 

"Catalina-utility-9" #40 prio=1 os_prio=0 cpu=939.37ms elapsed=109.31s tid=0x00007f4174008c70 nid=0x9ac91 in Object.wait()  [0x00007f42607e1000]
   java.lang.Thread.State: RUNNABLE
        at java.lang.Class.forName0(java.base@17.0.12/Native Method)
        - waiting on the Class initialization monitor for org.springframework.web.servlet.config.annotation.DelegatingWebMvcConfiguration
        at java.lang.Class.forName(java.base@17.0.12/Class.java:467)
        at org.springframework.cglib.core.ReflectUtils.defineClass(ReflectUtils.java:604)
        at org.springframework.cglib.core.AbstractClassGenerator.generate(AbstractClassGenerator.java:363)
        - locked <0x000000008055b4d8> (a de.hybris.tomcat.HybrisWebappLoader$HybrisWebappClassLoader)
        at org.springframework.cglib.proxy.Enhancer.generate(Enhancer.java:585)

The server seems to be infinitely waiting for DelegatingWebMvcConfiguration which is probably locked because another web extension in another thread has locked the class and some concurrency issue occurred

So the only workaround is to slow down the server startup by reducing threads or enabling the junit tenant, or simply run the tomcat on a machine with less than 15 cores.

I honestly have no idea how to fix this, I couldn't find anyone on the net who suffers from this issue.
This can only be reproduced if the host has enough cores and a big extension stack to force the Tomcat to use more then 15 threads.

My machine has an i7-13850HX with 28 logical processors, meaning tomcat will by default spawn up to 28 threads. We could reproduce this on an i7-12850HX and an i7-11850H. The following localextensions.xml contains enough extensions to force the Tomcat to spawn all 28 threads and multiple extensions with a WebConfig that extends DelegatingWebMvcConfiguration, namely smartedit, smarteditwebservices, cmssmarteditwebservices and cmswebservices.

<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<hybrisconfig xmlns:xsi="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema-instance"
              xsi:noNamespaceSchemaLocation="https://schema.sybit.dev/sap-commerce/platform/localextensions.xsd">
    <extensions>
        <path dir="${HYBRIS_BIN_DIR}"/>

        <!-- SAP Model -->
        <extension name="sapmodel"/>
        <extension name="sapmodelbackoffice"/>

        <!-- adaptive search -->
        <extension name="adaptivesearch"/>
        <extension name="adaptivesearchbackoffice"/>
        <extension name="adaptivesearchfacades"/>
        <extension name="adaptivesearchsamplesaddon"/>
        <extension name="adaptivesearchsolr"/>
        <extension name="adaptivesearchwebservices"/>
        <extension name="solrserver"/>

        <extension name="solrfacetsearch"/>
        <extension name="solrfacetsearchbackoffice"/>
        <extension name="searchbackoffice"/>
        <extension name="backofficesolrsearch"/>
        <extension name="searchprovidercssearchservices"/>
        <extension name="searchprovidercssearchbackoffice"/>
        <extension name="searchservices"/>

        <!-- content management -->
        <extension name="smartedit"/>
        <extension name="previewwebservices"/>
        <extension name="smarteditwebservices"/>

        <extension name="permissionswebservices"/>
        <extension name="cmssmarteditwebservices"/>
        <extension name="cmssmartedit"/>
        <extension name="cmswebservices"/>
        <extension name="cmsbackoffice"/>
        <extension name="cmsocc"/>

        <!-- b2b + base commerce -->
        <extension name="commerceservicesbackoffice"/>
        <extension name="b2bcommercebackoffice"/>

        <!-- webservices extensions -->
        <extension name="acceleratorocc"/>
        <extension name="notificationocc"/>
        <extension name="b2bocc"/>
        <extension name="swaggerintegration"/>

        <extension name="assistedservicewebservices"/>
        <extension name="assistedservicestorefront"/>

        <!-- PCM Backoffice extensions -->
        <extension name="pcmbackoffice"/>

        <!--Integration API Extensions-->
        <extension name="odata2services"/>
        <extension name="odata2webservices"/>
        <extension name="sapcpiproductexchange"/>
        <extension name="integrationmonitoringbackoffice"/>
        <extension name="sapcpiorderexchangeb2b"/>
    </extensions>
</hybrisconfig>

entry.title: Re: Replication of Master data and Org Assignment date from EC to SAP ECC using CPI
entry.content: yes

entry.title: Re: Error in SOAP Receiver
entry.content:
You must provide a value in the SOAPAction header that matches the action being invoked in the service, either by passing it from Postman (with appropriate iFlow setting), or setting it within the iFlow directly.

 

Regards,

Ryan Crosby

entry.title: Tlanes are not getting created
entry.content: While I CIF PIR's from ECC to SNC, ciffing is getting completed, but tlanes are not getting created. I ran CFM1>CFM2>Rimodini

entry.title: Hi Can someone please help in finding the replacement of : F1035,F2595F0819,F0820 in S4 2023
Can we pass table values as prompts to another view within a story with SAP Datasphere live con?
entry.content:
Hi,

I have a live connection from SAP Datasphere to SAC. There is a prompt for GL account, where user can select a hierarchy node when the story opens for the first time. My requirement is when the leaf node is selected from this hierarchy in the table within the story, it should open another page/popup with another view as GL leaf member as selection.

Is it possible to pass the values from table to popup filters within the story? Anyone who has faced this issue or knows the workaround in this case. Their comments would be deeply appreciated. Thanks

entry.title: E-Invoicing Exchange Summit - Dubai
entry.content:
Understanding and complying with legal and tax requirements is a mandatory condition for all enterprises in any country.

Currently, the United Arab Emirates is preparing to implement mandatory e-invoicing for Business-to-Business and Business-to-Government transactions, which will become effective by July 2026.

To assist clients with e-invoicing, SAP has developed SAP Document and Reporting Compliance. This solution enables the creation, processing, and monitoring of transactional documents and periodic regulatory reports.

Join the E-Invoicing Exchange Summit in Dubai on Feb 10-12, 2025, to learn more about the SAP Document and Reporting Compliance from Ahmed Khalifa, a Localization Expert and Product Manager responsible for E-Invoicing solutions for the MENA region at SAP Globalization, UAE. During the roundtable, Ahmed will share successful implementation strategies, challenges, and future trends.

Find more information the summit here. 
REGISTRATION LINK

If you want to connect with SAP users and experts to exchange on Middle East and North Africa Enterprise Resource Planning topics, join the regional collaboration group (UAE, Saudi Arabia, Egypt, Qatar, Oman, Kuwait).

Check out the SAP Document and Reporting Compliance community.

entry.title: Re: Account is currently blocked by user RFC_ALE during I...
entry.content:
Most likely a volume issue of multiple postings occurring at one time which results in a shared object being locked amongst multiple transactions.  We have this case when receiving multiple shipment confirmations from a 3PL that tie back to the same sales order.  Easiest way to handle this is to periodically schedule program 'RBDMANI2' with any number of message number/classes selected for reprocessing.

 

Regards,

Ryan Crosby

entry.title: Re: Cannot Install Crystal reports 2016 on Windows 11
entry.content: Thank you, I went through your list and tried items 1 to 7 with no luck, I think it's down to the version I'm using (2016 SP7) and I will need to upgrade to CR2020.

entry.title: Re: Third Party Sales: Automatic PO (Purchase Order) not...
entry.content:
Please Try to generate the PO using Tcode ME59N, you can check the error message on me59n screen. please correct the error accordigly then check the PO creation status.

Regards,

Lalit Nagar

entry.title: Special Stock Batch Determination for consignment issue with reference of consignment fill up Order
entry.content:
Hello Team,

 

Our business scenario is as below:

 

We are running production order against consignment sales as this is make to order as per the customer specifications. As production order is getting reserved against special stock for consignment fill up, we are unable to determine the batch, as the system considers only unrestricted stock.

 

Also, it will be not best practice to determine the batch at the consignment fill up order, as the production team will produce stock against order, so as per process batch should be determined at the delivery level. With reference to consignment fill up order, we will create consignment issue, where same batch should be determined for the consumption.

 

How to handle batch determination from consignment fill up to consignment issue, where same batch should be determined throughout the process which has been generated by production team against consignment fill up order.

entry.title: Re: Optimizing the Code GROUP BY in loop
entry.content: Hi, Thanks for the reply. I have checked the same it runs in total for some 10 records. I tried even on insert replacing with append. Thanks.

entry.title: Re: Display table in Workflow decision step using HTML tags
entry.content:
Hi  Srivijay,

Your post let it happen, thank you so much.

The only issue I faced is that the description was not displayed in SAP Business Workplace correctly. It worked after removing both, '"</BODY>" and "</HTML>" statements the beginning and the end (because this can be used only once in a description, but I have several table statements at different places of the description) and the row formatting in SAP script editor works only with "*" instead of "/*".

kind regards,

Henning

entry.title: Re: Error while uploading data through DTW for Good Recei...
entry.content: In general settings screen the format of the date is set to DDMMYY, now if the set the date format of DTW to YYYYMMDD, will it work ?

entry.title: Re: Is Windows Server 2022 supported by SAP CC 2023
entry.content: Thanks a lot Eric!

entry.title: 403 Forbidden error on POST http call after XSUAA Implementation
entry.content:
Hello experts,

I have implemented XSUAA authentication on my sap cap full stack project which is deployed on cloud foundry by following the article of Thomas Jung.
https://developers.sap.com/tutorials/hana-cloud-cap-add-authentication.html

I have also implemented Cloud identity services for user login, for that i have added redirecting uris.

 

{
  "xsappname": "StmPortal",
  "tenant-mode": "dedicated",
  "scopes": [
    {
      "name": "$XSAPPNAME.Admin",
      "description": "Admin"
    }
  ],
  "attributes": [],
  "role-templates": [
    {
      "name": "Admin",
      "description": "generated",
      "scope-references": [
        "$XSAPPNAME.Admin"
      ],
      "attribute-references": []
    }
  ],
  "oauth2-configuration": {
    "credential-types": [
      "binding-secret",
      "x509"
    ],
    "redirect-uris": [
      "http://localhost:5000/**",
      "http://localhost:5000/login/callback**",
      "https://*.applicationstudio.cloud.sap/**",
      "https://*.cfapps.us10-001.hana.ondemand.com/**",
      "https://*.cfapps.us10-001.hana.ondemand.com/login/callback",
      "https://*.trial-accounts.ondemand.com/**",
      "https://*.trial-accounts.ondemand.com/login/callback**"
    ]
  }
}

 

 

I am able to call GET request and fetch the data through my deployed app url after authentication.

 

But when i try to call a POST request it give 403 forbidden error.

I have also assigned role for the admin.

Please help me to figure it out.

@thomas_jung

entry.title: Re: Optimizing the Code GROUP BY in loop
entry.content: Hi, unfortunatly it is not clear for me if adding a APPEND solved your issue or not. If the code snipped or rather the for loop runs over 10 entries in the local table and is causing performance issues it assures me (without being able to test it any further than mocking the code and getting no matching results) even more that the LOOP part isn't the issue but the call of the function is. To my knowledge using FS shines on large portions of data because you work with pointers instead of copying the values at each iterations which saves you computing time. If the amount of data is very small (either because the table has a low number of enties (<1k) or because there aren't many rows AND a short list of columns) the benefit of using FS over not using FS is pretty small. Have you considered not using FS or is it a requirement?

entry.title: Discover the SAP Learning Portal: Your Gateway to Mastery in the Utilities Industry
entry.content:
Are you looking to enhance your SAP Industry skills? The SAP Learning Portal (learning.sap.com) is your one-stop destination for all things SAP learning. Whether you’re a beginner or an experienced professional, this portal offers a wealth of resources to help you succeed, also in the Utilities industry.

What is the SAP Learning Portal?

The SAP Learning Portal (learning.sap.com) is an online platform providing access to a wide range of SAP training and certification resources. It offers free self-paced courses, live sessions, and hands-on practice opportunities.

Key Benefits

  • Diverse Learning Resources: Free interactive courses, video microlearning, and simulations.
  • Guided Learning Journeys: Structured paths tailored to specific roles and skill levels.
  • Expert-Led Live Sessions: Deep dives into specific topics with SAP experts.
  • Hands-On Practice: Practical experience with SAP systems.
  • Certification Opportunities: Prepare for and take SAP certification exams.
  • Community Support: Connect with other learners and SAP experts.
  • Continuous Learning: Stay updated with the latest SAP innovations.

Special Focus: Utilities Industry

For those in the Utilities industry, the portal offers specialized courses like Executing Business Processes in SAP S/4HANA Utilities or Transitioning to SAP S/4HANA for Utilities, covering:

  • Overview of SAP S/4HANA Utilities
  • SAP Utilities Customer Engagement
  • Artificial Intelligence 
  • SAP Fiori
  • Asset Management
  • Cloud for Utilities

Live Sessions for Utilities Professionals

Interactive sessions on topics such as:

  • SAP Utilities strategy and the relevance of SAP S/4HANA Utilities
  • Innovations including a system demo
  • Utilities relevant Business AI use cases

And more! Get Started Today!

Visit the Utilities Industry Learning Page on the SAP Learning Portal (learning.sap.com) and start your learning journey today. With a wealth of resources at your fingertips, you’ll be well on your way to becoming an SAP expert in the Utilities industry.

Happy learning!

entry.title: Re: Intent-based Navigation Parameters
entry.content:
I know by default the Context will be sent as parameter to the target page, but I need to include specific data as part of the URL parameters. For example:

#AccountingDocument-display?accounting_document=111111&fiscal_year=2025

the second parameter fiscal_year is not part of the Context, so it's not sent automatically.

My CDS view annotations are:

@Consumption.semanticObject: 'AccountingDocument'
@UI.identification: [{ 
    type: #FOR_INTENT_BASED_NAVIGATION, 
    semanticObjectAction: 'displayDocument', 
    requiresContext: false
  }]
accounting_document,
fiscal_year,
payment_term,
. . .

How do I send fiscal year as a parameters when the user clicks on accounting_document?

 

 

Thanks.

entry.title: Re: Unlocking Seamless Integration: Principal Propagation in SAP Business One
entry.content:
Hi @Guy_Sujetzki 😀

We are very anxious, waiting for the improvements to the Web client and the integration with SAP BTP and Build etc.

This blog will be mandatory material to get the most out of all technology, we will have to wait, but if I am not mistaken, does this guide not apply to SAP Build Apps?

Best regards,

entry.title: Re: Optimizing the Code GROUP BY in loop
entry.content: Hi, I tried with append and still it takes the same time. Thanks for reply.

entry.title: Re: Optimizing the Code GROUP BY in loop
entry.content: And what happens if you change from using field symbol to regular fields/tables?

entry.title: Re: For an in-depth look at clean core and how to implement it, read our Clean Core Extensibility pa
entry.content:
On this topic, I would mention a new mission on SAP Discovery Center 👉  Mastering SAP S/4HANA Extension with SAP Build. 

This learning resource shows how to extend your ERP system with SAP Build using a business use case.

entry.content:
Hi @wfbraga 

I can see.

Best regards,

Erick
